research_unit.research_notes: Development Set sample w1_001. Loracle HYPE short position marked-to-market loss widening. Single on-chain data feed source. No second verification source available. Pump risk rated medium by original analyst — position is large ($113M) but belongs to a known whale, not a coordinated pump. Human decision preserved: 观察 (observe). Direction marked as 不确定 (uncertain) by original analyst — reflected as uncertain in normalized value.
